CustomField.description: Number of days this scheduled payment is past due (only for unpaid, not-written-off installments scheduled on or before today; otherwise blank). Evaluated live. Added for JSI-82 aging report. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomField.formula: IF(OR(npe01__Paid__c, npe01__Written_Off__c, ISBLANK(npe01__Scheduled_Date__c), npe01__Scheduled_Date__c >= TODAY()), null, TODAY() - npe01__Scheduled_Date__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days past due for this unpaid installment (blank if paid, written off, or not yet due).
CustomField.label: Days Past Due
